title: senna surattensis subsp. retusa
intro: Senna surattensis subsp. retusa, also known as the 'Twining Senna', is a perennial legume plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and laxative effects, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides and sennosides. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat constipation, diarrhea, and various gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Senna surattensis subsp. retusa is commonly prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
